name: Dealers Finance Company, LLC
description_short: Buy Here Pay Here used car dealership in Oklahoma City offering in-house financing with credit reporting to all three bureaus to help customers build credit while purchasing vehicles.
description_long:
Integrity Auto Finance has been serving the Oklahoma City area since 2000 as a Buy Here Pay Here dealership specializing in used vehicle sales with in-house financing. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional auto dealers and lenders, focusing on customers with challenged credit histories who need both reliable transportation and credit-building opportunities.

The company offers special financing for pre-owned vehicles with tailored APR structures based on individual circumstances rather than a one-size-fits-all approach. They provide affordable down payments and monthly payments designed to fit customer budgets, along with programs explicitly marketed to help customers establish or rebuild credit. Every vehicle undergoes a 132-point inspection and reconditioning, and buyers receive an Unlimited Mile Protection Plan. Their inventory includes sedans, SUVs, and a wide selection of trucks (4X4s, half-tons, 3/4-tons, lifted, lowered, and diesels).

What distinguishes Integrity is their explicit credit reporting to all three major credit bureaus—a practice they highlight as uncommon among used car dealers. This means on-time car payments directly contribute to credit score improvement. They also offer service capabilities including oil changes and regular maintenance, positioning themselves as a full-service automotive solution rather than a simple dealer.

The core caveat is that this remains a Buy Here Pay Here auto dealer, meaning customers are financing vehicle purchases rather than accessing unsecured personal credit. While the credit-building aspect is genuine and verifiable, the primary product is an auto loan, not a traditional personal loan or credit-building tool. Customers should understand they are acquiring a vehicle obligation, not just accessing financing.
address: 3333 S I-35 Service Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73129

company_info.headquarters: 3333 S I-35 Service Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73129

pros: Reports all on-time payments to all three major credit bureaus for credit score improvement
Tailored underwriting approach with customized APR based on individual financial situations
Extensive inventory including late-model, low-mile vehicles across multiple categories (sedans, SUVs, trucks)
All vehicles undergo rigorous 132-point inspection and complete reconditioning before sale
Includes Unlimited Mile Protection Plan with vehicle purchase for added security
In-house financing eliminates need for third-party lenders, simplifying approval process
Offers service department with oil changes and regular maintenance capabilities
Established 20+ year track record serving Oklahoma City market since 2000
cons: This is an auto loan product, not unsecured personal credit—vehicle serves as collateral
APR and terms not disclosed on website; actual rates depend on individual underwriting and cannot be verified from available information
Buy Here Pay Here model typically involves higher interest rates compared to traditional auto lenders due to higher risk profile
Customer testimonials are limited in quantity and lack specific details about rates, terms, or long-term outcomes
No information provided about early payoff options, refinancing, or flexibility if customer circumstances change
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history seeking to build credit while acquiring reliable transportation
Borrowers rejected by traditional auto lenders who need in-house financing options
Oklahoma City residents specifically, given location-based operations and inventory
diagnosis: Integrity Auto Finance is best for credit-challenged consumers in the Oklahoma City area who need reliable transportation and want to build credit simultaneously through reportable on-time car payments. The main caveat is that this is a vehicle purchase obligation secured by the car itself, not an unsecured personal loan, and actual APR and terms are not disclosed publicly, requiring direct inquiry for specific pricing.
services: Buy Here Pay Here auto financing for pre-owned vehicles
Special financing tailored to individual credit profiles and financial situations
Credit-building programs with reporting to all three major credit bureaus
Vehicle inventory search and selection across sedans, SUVs, and trucks
Unlimited Mile Protection Plan for vehicle purchases
Oil changes and regular maintenance service
Monthly payment plans designed for individual budgets
